title: Hannah of the Dead
overview: Kicked out of her mother's house, Hannah meets Fred, who offers her a place to crash at his seductive Airbnb. In no time at all, she strikes up a relationship with her soon to become fr-enemies, Holly and Lee, betrays Fred, scams a scandal-ridden politician, irritates a nosy neighbor and no help from a bribed detective. With no shortage of suspects to choose from, the question remains - what happened to Hannah?
